response.justification: Candidate has 13+ years of strong full-stack engineering experience with notable craftsmanship (TDD, CI/CD, testing tooling) and some adjacent dev-tools work (test runners, assertion libraries, CI setup, MCP code generators). However, the role requires explicit people management (2+ years) and technical leadership (3+ years) experience, neither of which is demonstrated on the resume — all positions are individual-contributor titles. There is also no mobile-platform ecosystem experience at scale and no evidence of leading organizational change or managing direct reports.
strengths: Strong engineering productivity instincts: built test runners (Trial), assertion libraries (Fluent-Asserts), CI/CD pipelines, and ran Refactoring Dojos
13+ years across web/mobile/desktop/embedded with deep testing and TDD background
Teaching and community track record (Selenium course, Web Internals workshop, FOSS4G talk) signals mentorship potential
concerns: No people-management or formal team-lead experience listed; all roles are IC (Senior/Staff Software Developer)
No demonstrated mobile-platform ecosystem work at scale (iOS/Apple TV work is from 2015–2016 and small in scope)
No evidence of setting team roadmaps, conducting 1:1s, performance management, or leading organizational change
